highlights.description: CLI tool for headless browser operations with `gorod fetch` command
Cookie extraction with conversion to standard `http.Cookie` format
Wait helper functions for reliable element interaction

added.description: `cmd/gorod` CLI tool with `fetch` command for headless page rendering
`Cookies` type wrapping Rod cookies with `HTTPCookies()` and `String()` methods
`WaitVisible()` function to wait for element visibility with timeout
`WaitClickable()` function to wait for element to be visible and enabled

changed.description: Use `bufio.Reader` for input handling in `ForegroundBrowser` (fixes empty line issues)
Add `MustWaitStable()` after page navigation for better reliability

documentation.description: Expanded README with quick start guide, API reference, and usage examples

dependencies.description: Add `fetchup` replace directive for rod v0.116.2 compatibility
Update GitHub Actions (checkout v6, setup-go v6, golangci-lint-action v9)

build.description: Update Go versions in CI workflow
Update golangci-lint to v2 with action v8

fixed.description: Fix integer overflow conversion `uint -> int64` (gosec G115)

highlights.description: Initial release with ForegroundBrowser for interactive browser sessions and full-page screenshot capture

added.description: `ForegroundBrowser` type for interactive browser sessions with pause capability
`NewForegroundBrowserPaused()` to launch browser and wait for user interaction
`RetrieveWriteScreenshotFullPage()` for full-page screenshots with HTTP status handling
`GetWriteFileHTML()` to fetch and save page HTML to file

build.description: GitHub Actions CI workflow for testing
Dependabot configuration for automated dependency updates
